previous_statement: FAITHFULNESS UPGRADE ||q^+|| <= C (eta/lambda) ||a||^2. For any x>=0: omega(x)=Tr(rho_omega x) (GT-state-density). By node 1.4.1, Tr(rho_omega x) >= lambda Tr(x); by node 1.4.2, Tr(x) >= ||x||. So omega(x) >= lambda||x|| for x>=0. Apply to x=q^+ >= 0 (1.1): lambda||q^+|| <= omega(q^+) <= C eta||a||^2 (1.3), so ||q^+|| <= C (eta/lambda)||a||^2.
new_statement: FAITHFULNESS UPGRADE ||q^+|| <= C (eta/lambda) ||a||^2. For any x>=0: omega(x)=Tr(rho_omega x) (GT-state-density). By node 1.4.1, Tr(rho_omega x) >= lambda Tr(x); by node 1.4.2, Tr(x) >= ||x||. So omega(x) >= lambda||x|| for x>=0. Apply to x=q^+ >= 0 (the positive part from node 1.1, a transitive dependency of this node via 1.3 whose declared deps are [1.1,1.2]; 1.1 is thus a recorded validated ancestor of 1.4): lambda||q^+|| <= omega(q^+) <= C eta||a||^2 (node 1.3), so ||q^+|| <= C (eta/lambda)||a||^2.
